@indexing.status.ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the small hourglass icon in the top-right corner that shows while Cmdr is indexing a drive. Read aloud by screen readers; the live progress is in its tooltip.

indexing.scan.label: Scanning your drive...

@indexing.scan.label.description: Tooltip heading shown while Cmdr scans a drive to build its index. This is a repeat scan (a prior scan exists, so progress is calibrated). The trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.scan.labelFirst.description: Tooltip heading shown while Cmdr scans a drive for the very FIRST time (no prior scan, so progress is only a rough estimate). The trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.scan.counters.description: Running tally appended to the scan tooltip heading, e.g. '12,345 entries, 678 dirs'. Has a leading space in the source so it joins the heading; 'dirs' is short for directories/folders (keep it terse, this is a compact status line).

placeholders.entriesText: number of files and folders scanned so far, already formatted (e.g. 12,345)
placeholders.dirsText: number of folders found so far, already formatted (e.g. 678)

@indexing.scan.etaRough.description: Wraps the estimated time remaining during a rough first scan to flag it as approximate, e.g. 'roughly 2m left'. {eta} is an already-formatted time-left phrase; don't translate inside it.

placeholders.eta: the formatted time-remaining phrase, e.g. '2m left'

@indexing.aggregation.savingEntries.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr saves scanned entries to its index database. Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.aggregation.loading.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr loads directories to compute folder sizes. Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.aggregation.sorting.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr sorts directories before computing folder sizes. Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.aggregation.computing.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr computes folder sizes from the index. Also the fallback heading for any unrecognized aggregation phase. Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.aggregation.writing.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr writes computed folder sizes back to its index. Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

indexing.replay.label: Updating index...

@indexing.replay.label.description: Tooltip heading while Cmdr replays recorded filesystem changes to bring its index up to date (a lighter operation than a full scan). Trailing '...' signals ongoing work; keep it.

@indexing.replay.detail.description: Tooltip detail line under the 'Updating index' heading, e.g. '1,234 events processed'. 'events' means recorded filesystem changes.

placeholders.eventsText: number of change events processed so far, already formatted (e.g. 1,234)

@indexing.eta.almostDone.description: Time-remaining phrase shown when an indexing operation has under two seconds left (a precise countdown there would be noise). Reassuring and terse.

@indexing.eta.secondsLeft.description: Estimated time remaining under a minute, e.g. '45s left'. The 's' is the abbreviation for seconds; keep this very short (it sits in a compact tooltip).

@indexing.eta.minutesLeft.description: Estimated time remaining of a minute or more, e.g. '3m left'. The 'm' is the abbreviation for minutes; keep this very short (it sits in a compact tooltip).

indexing.rescan.staleIndex: Your drive index is outdated. It looks like the app hasn''t run for a while. Running a fresh scan to catch up.

@indexing.rescan.staleIndex.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning the drive: the index went stale because the app wasn't open for a while. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.journalGap: The system''s file change log doesn''t go back far enough. Running a fresh scan to rebuild the index.

@indexing.rescan.journalGap.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: the macOS file-change journal no longer covers the gap since last run. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.replayOverflow: A lot of file changes happened since last run. Running a fresh scan instead of replaying them one by one.

@indexing.rescan.replayOverflow.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is doing a full rescan rather than replaying changes: too many changes accumulated since last run. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.tooManySubdirRescans: Many directories changed significantly since last run. Running a fresh scan to get everything up to date.

@indexing.rescan.tooManySubdirRescans.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: too many folders changed a lot since last run. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.watcherStartFailed: Couldn''t start the file change watcher. Running a fresh scan to get the index up to date.

@indexing.rescan.watcherStartFailed.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: the live file-change watcher couldn't start, so it falls back to a full scan. Calm and explanatory; avoid the words 'error' and 'failed'.

indexing.rescan.reconcilerBufferOverflow: Heavy filesystem activity overwhelmed the event buffer. Running a fresh scan to stay accurate.

@indexing.rescan.reconcilerBufferOverflo.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: a burst of filesystem activity overflowed an internal buffer. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.incompletePreviousScan: The previous scan didn''t finish (the app may have been closed). Restarting the scan from scratch.

@indexing.rescan.incompletePreviousScan.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: the last scan didn't complete (the app likely closed mid-scan). Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.watcherChannelOverflow: A burst of filesystem activity overflowed the watcher channel. Running a fresh scan to stay accurate.

@indexing.rescan.watcherChannelOverflow.description: Info toast explaining why Cmdr is rescanning: a burst of filesystem activity overflowed the watcher's internal channel. Calm and explanatory.

indexing.rescan.fallback: Running a fresh drive scan to keep the index accurate.

@indexing.rescan.fallback.description: Generic fallback info toast shown when Cmdr rescans the drive for a reason not covered by the specific messages. Calm and explanatory.
